mentions.note: Market overreacted to light Q2 guidance despite strong Q1 beat/raise; biotech funding recovery accelerating, pharma orders strengthening, China pharma/biotech picking up, Nvidia AI collaboration early but promising. Organic growth expected 3–4% FY.
Undervalued at 19x earnings; every IPO wave requires TMO's machines for validation; positioned for strong demand from upcoming IPO pipeline.
Trades <20x earnings with only 1% organic growth (management guidance 3–4% later). Systematically overvalued relative to growth; capital flowing away from legacy biopharma vendors.
